response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack of the role. His experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling is also relevant. He demonstrates a strong ability to work across the stack and contribute to various technologies.
strengths: Strong proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with AI-agent development and diverse technologies
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Kotlin/Java
Some experience is in different industries and not directly related to internal automation tooling
Some technologies mentioned are not directly aligned with the job description
